teamPage.title: Our <blue>Team</blue>
teamPage.subtitle: Uniting human vision with artificial intelligence to revolutionize global sports management with JOGABOLA.

dataEngineering.title: Data Engineering
dataEngineering.description: Massive processing of performance metrics and structuring of sports Big Data.

tacticalAnalysis.title: AI Tactical Analysis
tacticalAnalysis.description: Identification of game patterns and high-precision strategic scenario simulation.

intelligentSupport.title: Intelligent Support
intelligentSupport.description: 24/7 assistance for managers and athletes with natural language and immediate resolutions.

ecosystemPage.title: The Future of <blue>Sports Management</blue>
ecosystemPage.subtitle: Explore the next generation of Jogabola technology modules, developed to elevate the performance of clubs and athletes.

scout.title: Scout Pro IA
scout.description: Intelligent talent scouting with AI. Identify game patterns and future potential through advanced data analysis and computer vision.

finance.title: Elite Financial Module
finance.description: Automated financial control with maximum transparency. Contract management, treasury, and compliance via blockchain.

marketplace.title: Athletes Marketplace
marketplace.description: The digital showcase of football. Connect athletes, agents, and clubs in a secure ecosystem with AI-verified profiles.

health.title: AI Preventive Health
health.description: 24/7 biological and preventive management. Reduce injuries and optimize physical performance through real-time biometrics and AI.

depin.title: Sports DEPIN
depin.description: Decentralization of physical physical infrastructure. Tokenization of community spaces and incentives for neighborhood field maintenance.

monetization.title: Web3 Monetization
monetization.description: New revenue horizons for amateur football. Asset tokenization, loyalty programs, and sports circular economy.

coaching.title: Team Management Center
coaching.description: Total control of your team in one place. Organize training, manage athletes, and define tactics with professional tools.

timer.title: JogaBola Timer
timer.description: Advanced timing and real-time statistics recording. Transform every match into a professional experience.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Receive exclusive notifications about the launch of new modules and invites for closed betas.

about.title: About Jogabola
about.history_text: Jogabola was founded in {year} with the goal of transforming how people organize and participate in soccer games. Since then, we have worked tirelessly to make soccer more accessible to everyone.

business.name: Jogabola
business.slogan: The best place to find your team and play soccer.
business.shortDescription: The platform that connects soccer lovers with nearby sports fields.
business.longDescription: Jogabola was born from a passion for soccer and the difficulty in organizing matches between friends. Our platform connects passionate players with available fields, simplifying the booking process and helping to form new sports communities.
business.mission: Democratize access to soccer by connecting players and fields in a simple and intuitive way.
business.vision: To be the leading platform connecting players and soccer fields in Brazil.

passion.title: Passion for Sport
passion.description: We believe in the power of soccer to unite people and communities.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We work to make soccer accessible to everyone, regardless of skill level.

community.title: Community
community.description: We foster the creation of new friendships and communities through sport.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We constantly seek new ways to improve our users' experience.

findNearby.title: Find Nearby Games
findNearby.description: Locate fields and matches near you with just a few clicks.

reserveFields.title: Reserve Fields
reserveFields.description: Book fields quickly and securely, without complications.

joinTournaments.title: Join Tournaments
joinTournaments.description: Sign up for local tournaments and showcase your skills.

connectPlayers.title: Connect with Players
connectPlayers.description: Meet other soccer enthusiasts and expand your network.

paulo.name: Paulo Spiguel
paulo.bio: Passionate about technology and soccer, Paulo combines his two passions to create innovative solutions.

countDown.title: Time left
countDown.subtitle: We're working hard to launch our incredible app.
